spec.description: UniFi Poller v2.0.1 Displays detailed information for network switches in a UniFi network using Prometheus.
Shows data transferred for selected switch ports.
spec.title: Data Transfer

spec.description: Shows data transfer rate per second for Switch $Port. TX on positive axis and RX on negative axis.
spec.title: Data Transfer: Switch $Port

spec.description: This panel displays lifetime totals and current data as of now.
spec.title: All Port Information

spec.description: If you have access points and gateways they will also show up here because they have switch ports.
spec.title: Switch Details

spec.description: Shows errors and dropped packets for Switch $Port. RX on negative axis.
spec.title: Errors and Drops: Switch $Port

spec.description: Shows packet counters for Switch $Port. TX on positive axis and RX on negative axis.
spec.title: Packets Per Second: Switch $Port

spec.description: Shows broadcast and multicast packets per second for Switch $Port. TX on positive axis and RX on negative axis.
spec.title: Multicast & Broadcast: Switch $Port
UniFi-Poller: USW Insights - Prometheus
